'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 76''' was the seventy-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 11]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[EG-6 power droid/Legends|EG-6 Power Droid]]
*[[Hapan]] [[Gun of Command]]
*[[Light repeating blaster/Legends|Light Repeating Blaster]]
